payload.message:
come ti sembra per la release 0.0.2 su github del codice per le lavorazioni fatte su questo branch? Non mi piacciono molto le emoji leviamole e valuta il testo se rispecchia le feature. 

  v0.0.2 — UI Refinements
                                                                                                                                       
  A major pass on the React overlays: every panel has been rewritten to feel alive and in-sync with what Claude Code agents are
  actually doing. Selecting a hero — from the village, the Party Bar, or the Activity Feed — now highlights them consistently          
  everywhere and lets the camera follow.                          
                                                                                                                                       
  ✨ Activity Feed                                                

  - New layout with full / compact / closed fold states (persisted per-user via localStorage) and a taller full view.                  
  - Category highlights: auto-detected pills for Errors · Edits · Bash · Reads · Messages · Agent · Other — each category has its own
  border color and background tint, counters update as entries arrive.                                                                 
  - Prompt / Reply events rendered inline with markdown, distinct from tool rows (blue tint for prompts, gold for replies).
  - Per-row selection — clicking a row selects that agent everywhere and highlights the specific entry.                                
  - Scroll pinning with a Jump to latest (N new) button when you scroll back, and a N new badge that pulses when the feed is closed.   
  - VS Code path links with proper URL encoding.                                                                                       
  - Right-click context menu (copy path / copy detail / filter by agent).                                                              
                                                                                                                                       
  🤝 Subagents                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                       
  Subagents spawned via the Agent tool are now first-class citizens:                                                                   
                                                                  
  - Readable names resolved server-side from the parent session's Agent tool input (description → subagent_type → first-sentence       
  fallback), instead of raw session IDs.                          
  - "subagent" marker rendered above the sprite in the village so spawned helpers are instantly recognizable.                          
  - Agent-tool events get their own Agent highlight category in the feed, with a dedicated green-tinted palette.                       
                                                                                                                                       
  🛡️  Party Bar                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                       
  - Full rewrite with full / icons / closed fold states and a compact icon-only mode.                                                  
  - Larger avatars (up to 66px) with a status overlay dot (active / idle / waiting / error / completed).
  - Selection flash + subtle pulse animation when you pick a hero.                                                                     
  - Filters to active + idle only and sorts by priority.          
                                                                                                                                       
  🗡️  Hero selection in the village                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                       
  - Hero sprites are now clickable in the Phaser scene.                                                                                
  - Selected hero gets a soft radial-gradient halo behind the sprite (no more flat tinting).
  - Camera pans to the selected hero via a camera:follow event.                                                                        
  - Clicking the background deselects.                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                       
  🔍 Detail Panel (top-right)                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                       
  Rewritten for readability and freshness:                                                                                             
                                                                  
  - Hero avatar + status dot in the header, larger serif name colored per hero palette.                                                
  - Bigger fonts (session / usage rows 14px, paths and messages 13px), proper line-height and tabular numerics.
  - Live session counter — a 1s ticker keeps Session scrolling between server pushes.                                                  
  - Stale data hidden automatically: Current File, Current Command and Last Message disappear when the agent goes idle, so you never   
  see misleading "current" info from a past turn.                                                                                      
  - VS Code path links for Current File, Project, and every entry in Files Modified.                                                   
  - Error section gets its own red background tint + border, consistent with the feed styling.                                         
  - Inline styles removed, spacing reworked across all sections.                                                                       
                                                                                                                                       
  🎨 Color scheme                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                       
  A unified color system replaces the previous mix of ad-hoc values:                                                                   
  
  - Shared hero palette (HERO_LABEL_COLOR) — 5 text-tinted colors (blue #88BBFF, yellow #FFD700, red #FF8866, black #B8B8D0, purple    
  #C48BE8) calibrated for dark backgrounds. Reused by the Phaser name tag, Party Bar, Activity Feed rows, and Detail Panel so the same 
  agent has the same color everywhere.                                                                                                 
  - Server-side color deduplication (pickUnusedColorFor) — agents that share a derived name (same project, different session) no longer
   collide on the same color.                                                                                                          
  - Category palette for feed highlights — distinct hues for errors (red), edits (gold), bash (cyan), reads (purple), messages
  (orange), agent (green), other (grey), applied consistently on pills, row borders and row backgrounds.                               
  - Status palette (active / idle / waiting / error / completed) now shared between Party Bar avatars and the new Detail Panel status
  dot.                                                                                                                                 
                                                                  
  🧩 Shared components                                                                                                                 
                                                                  
  - HeroAvatar extracted as a reusable component that renders at any size (24 → 66px) from the Phaser sprite registry.                 
  - New hooks useFeedPrefs and usePartyPrefs with debounced localStorage persistence and unmount flush.
  - activityFeedUtils: filtering, grouping, category detection, path resolution — fully tested.                                        
                                                                                                                                       
  🧹 Cleanup                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                       
  - "By Agent" feed view removed (was confusing alongside the flat chronological log).                                                 
  - Selection pulse on feed rows replaced with a static highlight — easier to read, less visual noise.
  - Dead CSS rules and legacy inline styles pruned.                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                       
  ⚙️  Under the hood                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                       
  - EventBridge gains hero:clicked, selection:changed, camera:follow for Phaser ↔ React round-tripping.                                
  - Reduced-motion respected across animations.
  - Server broadcasts new Prompt (user input) and Reply (turn-end) activity log entries.                                               
                                                                                                                                       
  ⚠️  Known limitations                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                       
  - The Detail Panel does not yet show token usage or cost — the server currently initializes those fields to zero and does not        
  populate them from JSONL assistant messages. Tracked for a follow-up release.
  - status transitions (active → idle) can lag up to ~10s behind reality because the server re-derives state on a periodic tick.       
                                                                                                                                       
  ---
  Full changelog: v0.0.1...v0.0.2

Valuto il testo contro le modifiche effettive del branch e poi ti propongo una versione ripulita senza emoji. Parto da `git status`, dai tag/recent commit e da un diff rispetto a `v0.0.1` per capire se il release note è allineato alle feature reali.

payload.message: Ho già visto che il branch è quasi tutto centrato sulla UI client, in linea con il tema “UI refinements”. Adesso controllo il diff da `v0.0.1` sui file chiave per separare le feature effettivamente presenti da quelle raccontate in modo troppo forte o troppo specifico.

payload.message: C’è una cosa importante: il branch ha anche modifiche non committate proprio su `ActivityFeed`, `ActivityFeedHeader` e `DetailPanel`. Quindi per giudicare bene il testo della release guardo sia il diff da `v0.0.1` sia il delta locale non ancora in commit, altrimenti rischio di segnarti come “mancanti” feature che in realtà hai già aggiunto nel working tree.
